headline: Morgan Stanley upgrades Global Payments to Overweight on Worldpay optimism
summary: Investing.com -- Morgan Stanley upgraded Global Payments to Overweight from Equal-weight and raised its price target to $100 from $65, arguing the payments processor offers an attractive risk-reward profile as improving execution, stronger buyback capacity and a depressed valuation create room for a significant rerating.
